description: MVP city-tier Home Scene launch matrix. This file defines which city + state + music community tuples should be operationally opened first. It is implementation support only and does not override canon.
architectureRule: Home Scene architecture is invariant. City and music-community identity change scene data, membership, content, activity, and later generated Prime-model structures; they must not change Home/Plot/Events/Archive/player/action architecture, tabs, menus, routing, or runtime behavior.

missingCommunityRequests.reviewEligibility: Requires repeated submissions from distinct people in distinct cities before review eligibility. Users still choose one of the approved launch communities to complete onboarding.
